help.title: Help
help.qs_1_desc: Click "Register" on the login page, fill in your username, email and password. Admin approval is required before you can use the app.
help.qs_2_desc: Use your username or email + password to log in.
help.qs_3_desc: Go to "Dishes" and click "+ New" to enter a dish name and recipe.
help.qs_4_desc: On the home page, click "+ Create New Menu", set the title, meal time, invite family members, and add dishes.
help.qs_5_desc: After being invited, go to the menu detail page to select your preferred dishes.
help.flow_1_desc: A new menu starts as a "Draft". You can freely edit the title, dishes, and invitees.
help.flow_2_desc: Once dishes and invitees are set, click "Publish". Invited family members will be notified and can start voting.
help.flow_3_desc: Voting closes at the deadline or when manually closed. No new selections are accepted.
help.flow_4_desc: After voting closes, the menu enters "Cooking" status. You can print the menu list.
help.flow_5_desc: After the meal, mark it as "Complete" to archive.
help.dish_create: Enter a dish name (required). You can add a description (Markdown supported), tags, cooking methods, and ingredients.
help.dish_search: Search by Chinese name, full pinyin, or pinyin initials. E.g., searching "hsr" finds "红烧肉".
help.dish_photo: Upload JPG/PNG/WebP photos on the dish detail page, max 5MB each.
help.dish_clone: Quickly create variations based on existing dishes.
help.pref_desc: View family members' dish preferences in the "Preferences" page to see everyone's favorites.
help.notif_1: You'll be notified when invited to a new menu.
help.notif_2: Menu status changes (publish, close, cooking, etc.) will notify relevant members.
help.notif_3: The notification icon in the bottom nav shows the unread count.
help.settings_edit: Edit your display name, family role, and other info.
help.admin_desc: Admins can access the admin panel via "Profile" → "Admin":
help.admin_users: Approve new registrations, create users, reset passwords.
help.pwa_desc: This app supports PWA (Progressive Web App). Add it to your home screen to use it like a native app.
help.pwa_ios: In Safari, tap the Share button → "Add to Home Screen".
help.pwa_android: In Chrome, tap the menu → "Add to Home Screen" or "Install App".
help.faq_a1: New accounts require admin approval. Please contact your admin.
help.faq_a2: Have them register and get approved first, then select them when creating a menu.
help.faq_a3: Try searching by pinyin initials, e.g., type "hsr" to find "红烧肉".
help.faq_a4: Click the "Print" button on the menu management page for a printer-friendly view.
